meta.title: Innovation Hub | Taibah Valley
meta.description: Taibah Valley's Innovation Hub supports innovators, entrepreneurs and investors with training, consulting, workspaces, incubation and connected digital platforms.
meta.keywords: Taibah Valley, Innovation Hub, Madinah, entrepreneurship, incubator, accelerator, startups, training, consulting

labels.contentError: The selected language could not be loaded.

hero.title: We create innovative solutions
hero.lead: An integrated entrepreneurship community that supports innovators, serves investors, and connects experts and service providers with entrepreneurs.
audience: We support innovators and serve investors.
We connect experts and service providers with entrepreneurs.

overview.title: A connected ecosystem for innovation and entrepreneurship
overview.body: We incubate entrepreneurial projects, accelerate startup growth, and design training programmes and competitions that contribute to economic development.
overview.note: For Innovation Hub enquiries, contact our specialist team.

services.title: Services built around your venture
services.intro: The Innovation Hub brings practical support together in one place, from early-stage learning through to investment access and company growth.

items.title: Training
items.description: We provide diverse training programmes in technologies that support entrepreneurship, while enriching specialist content in entrepreneurship and future skills.

items.title: Consulting
items.description: Specialist consulting with leading advisers, delivering administrative guidance and inventive solutions for business development.

items.title: Events
items.description: We participate in events by providing a fertile environment that supports innovative ideas and projects.

items.title: Co-working spaces
items.description: Shared workspaces that enable entrepreneurs to carry out their work in a suitable environment.

items.title: Business incubator and accelerator
items.description: An incubator to embrace your project and nurture your startup.

items.title: Meetups
items.description: Led by experts and specialists to raise digital, entrepreneurship and innovation awareness across the community.

items.title: Competitions
items.description: Entrepreneurship competitions open new horizons and create opportunities through advisory, logistical, technical and legal support.

items.title: Investment and funding channels
items.description: We help project owners reach investors and explore funding opportunities.

items.title: Administrative services
items.description: We provide administrative and organisational support for entrepreneurs and startups.

platforms.title: Submit your request
platforms.intro: Choose the service or platform that best matches your needs.

manifesto.title: We create innovative solutions
manifesto.quote: At Taibah Valley, we believe that innovation is the driver of success in solving everyday problems.
manifesto.body: We offer scale-up and market-access programmes for small and medium enterprises and facilitate access to global exhibitions. We also provide market-entry knowledge, innovation-management solutions, foundational innovation support, expert consulting, access to applications and more services that empower the economy and encourage knowledge exchange.

cta.label: Get in touch with the Innovation Hub

footer.blurb: Madinah's innovation hub supporting startups, research, investment and digital transformation. Taibah University, Building 132, Madinah.
